message:
test(wave-66): trait coverage for mpsc, watch, obligation, distributed_region

mpsc SendError/RecvError Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq, watch SendError/RecvError/
ModifyError Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq, SourceLocation/ObligationKind/
ObligationAbortReason Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/Eq, DistributedRegionState
Debug/Clone/Copy/Hash/Eq, ConsistencyLevel/ReplicaStatus Debug/Clone/
Copy/Eq, DistributedRegionConfig Debug/Clone/Default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
